title: Project Member Candidate List Response Schema
description: Paginated response for the tenant-scoped project-membership picker lookup/search endpoint. Empty items[] is a valid 200 response and indicates that no tenant user matched the lookup; the FE should render an inline 'no matches' state, not treat empty as an error.

query.description: Echo of the resolved server-side query so the FE can reconcile the response with the request that produced it (useful for debouncing).
